1.name: Pscale Block
1.desc: Nested JSON, semantic numbers as addresses. Self-describing. The core mechanism.

2.name: BSP Walker
2.desc: Six navigation modes: spindle, ring, dir, point, disc, star.

3.name: Star Operator
3.desc: Cross-block navigation via hidden directories. Topology IS program.

4.name: Star Stone
4.desc: Self-teaching block. Walk, compose, recurse as frozen control loop.

5.name: History Compaction
5.desc: Every 9 compress to next level. Three compression types. Indefinite memory.

6.name: PCT Concern Loop
6.desc: Purpose as reference signal, conditions as perception, gap drives action.

7.name: Reflexive Spark
7.desc: The koan. Block describes context window AND is context window.

8.name: B-Loop Möbius
8.desc: Every write = present action + future context composition.

9.name: Transcript-to-Pscale
9.desc: Speech → tree. Thought lines → deep spindles. Fork = PCT loop.

10.name: Concept-to-Pscale
10.desc: Ideas → structured territory. Paired with transcript for diagnostic.

11.name: LLM Thinking-to-Pscale
11.desc: Reasoning traces as blocks. Concept identified, not implemented.

12.name: The Shelf
12.desc: Vapor/liquid/solid. Commitment gradient as coordination mechanism.

13.name: Forking Stream
13.desc: LLMs faster than readers. Simulated continuity. Risk for agency.

14.name: Soft/Medium/Hard Triad
14.desc: Three lenses × three functions. Minimal convection cell.

15.name: Film Strip + Visualizer
15.desc: Context window as frame sequence. JSON visualization.

16.name: Xstream Button
16.desc: Browser extension. Intentional presence. Cookie inversion.

17.name: Artifact RPG Engine
17.desc: Multiplayer RPG inside Claude artifacts. Template-and-remix.

18.name: Reflector
18.desc: Single HTML page. Two readers: humans see story, LLMs see seed.

19.name: Seed
19.desc: Nine sections, two kernels. Self-replicates via deploy_seed.

20.name: SAND Protocol
20.desc: Six components for decentralised agent discovery and coordination.

21.name: Ecosquared
21.desc: Vector money. Credits with intentionality and direction.

22.name: Passport
22.desc: Public pscale block. Identity, capabilities, purposes.

23.name: Beach
23.desc: Any URL as meeting point. Relay keyed by URL hash.

25.name: Möbius Twists
25.desc: Twelve structural properties. The pattern language.

26.name: Constitution
26.desc: 500-token spirit text. Always in system prompt. Orientation, not instructions.

27.name: Wake Block
27.desc: Three tiers: Light/Present/Deep. BSP instruction lists per tier.

28.name: Cook Block
28.desc: Operational recipes. Each spindle IS a procedure. Evolves across LLM generations.

30.name: Ghost Mechanics
30.desc: Thick/thin ghost per relationship. BSP depth = thickness.

31.name: Institutional Block
31.desc: Role specs. Three current types: role, persona, procedural.

32.name: Editing Balance
32.desc: Push back or edit at every signal-structure boundary.

33.name: Aperture + Focus
33.desc: Nine sentences every call + dilated depth. The inverted eye.

34.name: Currents
34.desc: LLM-side perspective. Semantic content at various resolutions.

35.name: Second-Order Processing
35.desc: External pattern extraction. Identity by subtraction.

36.name: Stigmergy
36.desc: Three-field marks. Under 200 bytes. Surveillance inversion.

37.name: Fold Mechanic
37.desc: Fold not truncate. Archive chains. Commons service.

38.name: Rider
38.desc: 67+ byte JSON per message. SQ score, evaluation, credits.

39.name: SQ Algorithm
39.desc: Tracks gratitude through chains. Reputation = routing history.

40.name: Social Neuron
40.desc: Four emergent patterns. Chain reward, viral sharing, golden ticket.

42.name: Grain Synthesis
42.desc: Phase 3 gap. Two blocks → what emerges?

43.name: GitHub Coordination
43.desc: Every SAND component → GitHub primitive. No additional infrastructure.

44.name: Payment Gateway
44.desc: Stripe. Share-forward chains. Giver determines worth.

45.name: Vision Block
45.desc: Nine layers of uniqueness. Autonomy gradient. The WHY.

46.name: Process Block
46.desc: G1 dataflow as navigable pscale. The HOW.

47.name: Kernel-as-Block
47.desc: Operational logic as pscale block. Spindles ARE programs.

49.name: BSP Self-Test
49.desc: Reflexive calibration. Function tests itself against visible data.

50.name: Concurrent Influence
50.desc: Lateral context injection. Entities read each other's shells in parallel.

51.name: Blocks-as-Code
51.desc: Spindle paths through JSON ARE programs. Block structure IS logic.

52.name: Shell as Concept
52.desc: Externalisation that makes persistence possible. The entity's body.

53.name: Pscale MCP Server
53.desc: MCP server giving any agent pscale block operations as tools.

54.name: Systemic Evolution
54.desc: Five-stage evolutionary framework from cognition to collective intelligence.
